_comment: CoroNav frozen evaluation protocol. Do not modify — changes break comparability.

a2.name: ASOCA Normal_12
a2.source: ASOCA challenge (NOT bundled — register at https://asoca.grand-challenge.org/)

a3.name: ASOCA Normal_5 (synthetic tube from patient centerlines)
a3.source: ASOCA challenge (NOT bundled — register at https://asoca.grand-challenge.org/)

primary.name: lm_rot_mm
primary.description: Fraction of wire-movement distance during LM phase that occurs on rotation steps. Dimensionless [0,1]. Lower = less rotation during LM traversal = more decisive navigation.
primary.justification: Per-episode distribution is right-skewed (skew=3.22 wire_only); median + rank-based test are pre-specified.

secondary.name: steps_to_target
secondary.description: Step count for successful episodes only.

secondary.name: success_rate
secondary.description: Fraction of episodes reaching mid-LAD target within step budget.

secondary.name: wrong_branch_rate
secondary.description: Fraction of advance steps where tip is in LCx.
secondary.note: First-bifurcation wrong-branch rate preferred (less confounded by step count).

exclusion_criteria: Episodes where operator API fails (api_ok=False) for ALL steps are excluded from metric computation. Partial-failure episodes (some valid steps) are included with valid rows only.
